My Garden

Digital garden

A digital garden is a personal wiki of interlinked notes that grow over time. Unlike a blog's reverse-chronological stream, a garden is a web you tend: notes connect to one another, and the connections matter as much as the notes.

This starter garden demonstrates two of mug's features for that style of writing: Wikilinks for connecting notes, and Backlinks for surfacing the connections in reverse.
